questions.question: What problem does MCP (模型上下文协议) solve for AI agents?
options: It provides a standard format for training data
It gives agents a standard way to discover与use tools exposed by external servers, without hardcoding tool implementations
It encrypts communication between agents
It compresses large context windows to fit in smaller models
questions.explanation: MCP standardizes tool access：a server exposes tools with JSON schemas,与any MCP-compatible agent can discover与call them. This decouples tool implementation from agent code.

questions.question: What is the difference between MCP与A2A?
options: MCP is for Python agents与A2A is for JavaScript agents
MCP connects agents to tools (agent-to-tool), while A2A connects agents to other agents (agent-to-agent) for task delegation
MCP is synchronous与A2A is asynchronous
MCP is open source与A2A is proprietary
questions.explanation: MCP is the protocol for tool access (an agent calls a tool). A2A is the protocol for agent collaboration (an agent delegates a task to another agent). They solve different layers of the communication problem.

questions.question: In A2A, what is an 'agent card'与why is it important?
options: A visual dashboard showing agent performance metrics
A JSON document at a well-known URL that describes an agent's capabilities, skills,与endpoint, enabling other agents to discover与delegate tasks to it
A security credential that authenticates an agent's identity
A configuration file that sets the agent's system prompt
questions.explanation: The agent card (hosted at /.well-known/agent.json) is how agents advertise themselves. It lists skills, supported input/output formats,与the task endpoint. Other agents read this card to decide whether与how to delegate work.

questions.question: Why do multi-agent systems need structured communication protocols instead of just passing strings between agents?
options: Strings are too large to send over HTTP
Structured protocols provide type safety, discoverability, error handling,与interoperability between agents built by different teams with different frameworks
String parsing is computationally expensive for LLM
Structured protocols are required by all cloud providers
questions.explanation: Without structured contracts, agents from different teams misinterpret each other's output, error handling is ad-hoc,与there is no way to discover what another agent can do. 协议 provide the shared language that makes multi-agent systems reliable.

questions.question: How does ACP (智能体 Communication 协议) differ from A2A in its design goals?
options: ACP is faster than A2A for real-time applications
ACP focuses on enterprise auditability with full message history与compliance tracking, while A2A focuses on lightweight task delegation
ACP only works within a single organization while A2A works across organizations
ACP uses WebSockets while A2A uses HTTP
questions.explanation: ACP was designed for enterprise environments where every agent interaction must be auditable, traceable,与compliant. A2A is simpler与focuses on getting tasks done. ACP adds the governance layer that regulated industries require.
